# 1.7 Prompt Chain Base Traits

Part of [Component 1 — repcheck-shared-models](../01-SHARED-MODELS.md)

## Classes (all new)

| Class/Trait | Type | Fields/Methods |
|-------------|------|----------------|
| `PromptStage` | Enum | System, Persona, Lens, Context, Guardrails, Output, Custom |
| `InstructionBlock` | Case class | name: String, stage: PromptStage, weight: Double (0.0-1.0), version: String, content: String |
| `StageConfig` | Case class | stage: PromptStage, blockNames: List[String], weight: Double |
| `PromptProfile` | Case class | name: String, chain: List[StageConfig] |
| `ChainAssembler` | Trait | `assemble(profile: PromptProfile, blocks: Map[String, InstructionBlock], context: Map[String, String]): Either[String, String]` |
| `WeightTranslator` | Object | `translate(weight: Double, content: String): String` — wraps content with emphasis markers based on weight |

## Acceptance Criteria — 1.7 Prompt Chain Base Traits

**Functional:**
1. `PromptStage` enum has values: System, Persona, Lens, Context, Guardrails, Output, Custom with Circe codecs and `fromString` parser.
2. `InstructionBlock` has Circe codecs for reading from GCS (YAML/JSON block files).
3. `PromptProfile` has Circe codecs for reading profile definitions from GCS.
4. `ChainAssembler.assemble` orders stages: System > Persona > Lens > Context > Custom > Guardrails > Output.
5. `ChainAssembler.assemble` applies `WeightTranslator` to each block's content before concatenation.
6. `ChainAssembler.assemble` merges multiple blocks within same stage into single section.
7. `ChainAssembler.assemble` injects context values into Context stage blocks by replacing placeholder tokens.
8. `ChainAssembler.assemble` returns `Left` if referenced block name not found in blocks map.
9. `WeightTranslator` rules: 1.0 = "You MUST..." (strong); 0.7-0.9 = standard framing; 0.3-0.6 = "When possible..."/"Consider..." (advisory); <0.3 = soft suggestion (de-emphasized).

**Error Handling:**
10. `ChainAssembler.assemble` returns `Left` with descriptive message listing all missing block names.
11. `InstructionBlock` decoder returns clear error if weight outside 0.0-1.0 range.

**Test Requirements:**
12. Unit test: assemble profile with one block per stage, verify correct ordering.
13. Unit test: assemble profile with multiple Lens blocks, verify grouped in Lens section.
14. Unit test: profile references missing block name, verify `Left` with block name in error.
15. Unit test: context injection replaces `{{bill_text}}` placeholder with actual bill text.
16. Unit test: weight 1.0 wraps with "You MUST", 0.5 wraps with "When possible", 0.2 wraps with soft suggestion.
17. Round-trip codec tests for `InstructionBlock` and `PromptProfile`.
